title.description: Long label shown in the hover tooltip for this altitude-based info series.

icon.description: Icon key shown in the top-of-page indicator.

order.description: Display order when multiple altitude info indicators are active at the same time.

tags.description: Optional tags for filtering. 3-100 characters each, max 20 unique tags per item.

values.description: Non-overlapping altitude bands for this series.

value.description: Rendered value for the active altitude band, for example '12 C' or '7.2 mol/m3'.

startPoint.description: Inclusive start altitude for this value band.

endPoint.description: Inclusive end altitude for this value band. Must be >= startPoint and must not overlap other value bands in the same series.
